heroBlock.title: Corporate Communications
heroBlock.description: Connect directly with our specialized logistics teams and corporate trading desks. We maintain continuous operational readiness across all major maritime and financial time zones.

contactBlock.subtitle: Corporate Communications
contactBlock.title: Initiate a Trade Inquiry
contactBlock.description: Please provide specific details regarding your supply chain requirements. Inquiries regarding physical commodities, maritime chartering, and terminal logistics will be routed directly to the appropriate regional trading desk.
contactBlock.securityDescription: All submitted data is encrypted and processed in strict adherence to international corporate privacy standards. We do not engage with unverified third-party brokers.

form.messagePlaceholder: Specify target commodities, required volumes, or destination ports...

contactBlock.successMessage: Your inquiry has been securely routed to the appropriate global desk. A representative will contact you shortly.
